title: Living-canvas hero opener with a stable product focal
description: A staged product hero rises into a living depth field while wallpaper, light, and decorative layers keep breathing behind stable readable copy.

params.name: eyebrow
params.description: Short product or release label above the hero claim.

params.name: headline
params.default: Launch stories that stay in motion

params.name: body
params.description: One supporting sentence kept stable while the environment moves.
params.default: From release thread to finished film, without leaving the channel.

params.name: metric
params.description: Compact proof value inside the product surface.

params.name: metricLabel
params.description: What the compact proof value means.

params.name: accent
params.description: Brand token for light, status, and product accents.

params.name: settleSec
params.description: Seconds after scene start when the hero finishes assembling.

params.name: ambientSec
params.description: Finite duration of the background drift; keep within the scene.
